name: Set up Maropost Commerce Cloud Pick'n Pack

If this cannot be toggled on, you either do not have the drivers or adequate firmware installed for your barcode scanner. See "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.netohq.com%2Fsupport%2Fs%2Farticle%2FLineaPro-Firmware-Update", "children": [{"text": "this article"}]}, {"text": " to learn how to update your scanner."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Leave "}, {"text": "Barcode Type", "bold": true}, {"text": " as "}, {"text": "Default Barcode List ", "bold": true}, {"text": ", unless you have a special type of barcode you are trying to scan in the extended or ISO 15424 barcode list."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set the "}, {"text": "Label Printer ", "bold": true}, {"text": " setting to "}, {"text": "Air Print", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Toggle "}, {"text": "Always Use Label Printer", "bold": true}, {"text": " to "}, {"text": "On", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set "}, {"text": "Print Preview", "bold": true}, {"text": " to "}, {"text": "Off", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you wish to print labels from Pick'n Pack, in the "}, {"text": "Printer Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " section:"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your app is now set up. See the related articles on how to process orders through Pick'n Pack."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Launch Pick'n Pack from a PC or Android device"}], "data-id": "launch-pick-n-pack-from-a-pc-or-android-device"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To access Pick'n Pack from a browser, please  log into your control panel, and hover over your username. Click on "}, {"text": "Mobile Pick & Pack Interface", "bold": true}, {"text": " to launch it in your browser."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can also add "}, {"text": "/do/suppliers/mobile", "bold": true}, {"text": " to the end of your website address (e.g. www.mymaropost.com/do/suppliers/mobile) to access the login screen."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Related Articles"}], "data-id": "related-articles"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.netohq.com%2Fsupport%2Fs%2Farticle%2Fka10K000000Qhj1QAC%2FPrepare-your-Products-for-Pick-n-Pack", "children": [{"text": "Prepare your Products for Pick'n Pack"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.netohq.com%2Fsupport%2Fs%2Farticle%2FNeto-Pick-n-Pack-Recommended-Hardware", "children": [{"text": "Recommended Hardware"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/process-pick-pack-and-dispatch-orders-in-pick-n-pack", "children": [{"text": "Understand Order Processing in Maropost Commerce Cloud Pick'n Pack"}]}]}]}]}]
